_comment: PLANETS MANIFEST — vendored read-only from Earth's mirrors (aguidetocloud-revamp/data/planets.toml + 4 JSON mirrors). Source of truth for slug/name/url/tagline. Atlas adds atmosphere/orbit/card fields in atlas.json (sibling) — atlas does NOT pollute the canonical manifest. When other planets refresh their manifest, this file should be re-vendored. Last vendored: 8 May 2026.
